title: erica acuta var. acuta
intro: Erica acuta var. acuta, also known as the dwarf heather, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North Africa and the Mediterranean region. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erica acuta var. acuta include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to leverage its medicinal properties.
